name_cn:
Top-tier Original M81866 Screen Print
Monogram Mahjong Bag Series MINI POCHETTE ACCESSORIES Small Handbag Polka Dot Master Yayoi Kusama Collaboration Series M58009 This mini wallet is made of canvas, can hold cosmetics or personal items, features a gold brass chain, convenient to clip the wallet to a handbag. 14 x 9 x 2 cm
